description: Minimal stub roster + interactions for the western-sci-fi frontier theme. Expand when the dedicated theme work resumes.

law: Walk easy. Town's quiet today and I'd like to keep it that way.
Hands where I can see 'em — frontier rules, not personal.
outlaw: Heard you were looking. Coin first, then we talk.
Marshal asks, you didn't see me.
wayfarer: Long road behind, longer ahead. Got water?
Stranger. The dust knows everyone eventually.
trade: Buying or browsing? Either way, mind the still.
Fair price is whatever the marshal can't haggle me down to.
peasant: Howdy. Mind the pump line at the well.

law: I've got my eye on {relation_name}. Always have.
outlaw: {relation_name} owes me a debt. The polite kind, for now.
wayfarer: Met {relation_name} on the road outside town. Strange company to keep.
